behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file path packages/injected/src/ariaSnapshot.ts, the function textContributesInfo, the longestCommonSubstring utility, and provides all test-case name/text pairs used in the tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the broken behavior and expected input/output cases without stating the specific line to remove or the exact code change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only assert truthy/falsy returns of textContributesInfo for specific cases and check the function/LCS call exist; alternative correct implementations satisfying these cases would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract and execute the textContributesInfo function via a Node.js subprocess harness and assert on return values.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stub returning True would fail exclusion tests (covered_hello, covered_foo, empty_text); stub returning False would fail inclusion tests—requires real logic.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All inclusion and exclusion cases listed in instruction.md are covered by test_text_contributes_unique_short_text, test_text_contributes_partial_overlap, and test_preserved_exclusions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with section header comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Repo CI/CD) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, function names, and commands appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points at the file and function responsible but does not reveal which specific lines to remove/change.
